channel.title: nutshell
channel.generator: Webpage HTML Export plugin for Obsidian

item.title: FCT PhD Call 2026
item.description:
llava-styleclip-stylereview articlesubtract z2 - z1inject z_prev in z_currlstmself-sup pretraingru, tfnot sure about this?rehersal SLLlinear attention (abmil)add lstm to unet bottlenecktfReviewWang, Xin, Tao Tan, Yuan Gao, et al. “Predicting Short-to Long-Term Breast Cancer Risk from Longitudinal Mammographic Screening History.” Npj Breast Cancer 11, no. 1 (2025): 118.Longitudinal + MultimodalLongitudinalMultimodalInput -> ImagingIngest a variable-length sequence at the inputInput -> Imaging + TextLLM-based orchestratorUses LLM to make predictions (generate text, route to task-specific heads)Explicitly ingest two timepoints in inputUses contrastive loss to create shared latent spaceUses projection module to map vision latent into language latentIngest t1 and t2Vision -> Language alignmentVision -> Language projectioncross-modal imputationPromote cross-modal deps by using one modality to predict another as auxiliary objectiveLink, Katherine E., Zane Schnurman, Chris Liu, et al. “Longitudinal Deep Neural Networks for Assessing Metastatic Brain Cancer on a Large Open Benchmark.” Nature Communications 15, no. 1 (2024): 8170.Petrochuk, Jessica, Suraj Pai, John He, et al. “Foundation Model Based Prediction of Lung Cancer Survival Using Temporal Changes in Dual Time Point CT Scans.” Scientific Reports 15, no. 1 (2025): 43042.Wang, Weiping, Guang Yang, Yulin Liu, et al. “Multimodal Deep Learning Model for Prognostic Prediction in Cervical Cancer Receiving Definitive Radiotherapy: A Multi-Center Study.” Npj Digital Medicine 8, no. 1 (2025): 503.Gao, Yuan, Sofia Ventura-Diaz, Xin Wang, et al. “An Explainable Longitudinal Multi-Modal Fusion Model for Predicting Neoadjuvant Therapy Response in Women with Breast Cancer.” Nature Communications 15, no. 1 (2024): 9613.Pahud de Mortanges, Aurélie, Haozhe Luo, Shelley Zixin Shu, et al. “Orchestrating Explainable Artificial Intelligence for Multimodal and Longitudinal Data in Medical Imaging.” Npj Digital Medicine 7, no. 1 (2024): 195. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41746-024-01190-w.⭐ Zhuang, Luoting, Stephen H. Park, Steven J. Skates, Ashley E. Prosper, Denise R. Aberle, and William Hsu. “Advancing Precision Oncology through Modeling of Longitudinal and Multimodal Data.” IEEE Reviews in Biomedical Engineering, 2025.
Zhou, Hong-Yu, Julián Nicolás Acosta, Subathra Adithan, Suvrankar Datta, Eric J. Topol, and Pranav Rajpurkar. “MedVersa: A Generalist Foundation Model for Diverse Medical Imaging Tasks.” NEJM AI 0, no. 0 (2026): AIoa2500595. https://doi.org/10.1056/AIoa2500595.Multimodal fusionAggregate embeddings from different modalitiesMultimodal alignmentAlso uses contrastive loss, but shared latent is >2 modalities (not only vision/language)
Bi, Qiu, Conghui Ai, Linhao Qu, et al. “Foundation Model-Driven Multimodal Prognostic Prediction in Patients Undergoing Primary Surgery for High-Grade Serous Ovarian Cancer.” Npj Precision Oncology 9, no. 1 (2025): 114. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41698-025-00900-1.Ye, Yiwen, Yutong Xie, Jianpeng Zhang, Ziyang Chen, Qi Wu, and Yong Xia. “Continual Self-Supervised Learning: Towards Universal Multi-Modal Medical Data Representation Learning.” Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition, 2024, 11114–24.Input -> Imaging + Pathology + TextInput -> Imaging + PathologyInput -> EHR + ImagingInput -> EHRIngest t1, t2, t3, ...Placido, Davide, Bo Yuan, Jessica X. Hjaltelin, et al. “A Deep Learning Algorithm to Predict Risk of Pancreatic Cancer from Disease Trajectories.” Nature Medicine 29, no. 5 (2023): 1113–22.Huang, Xu, Zeyan Xu, Yingnan Zhao, et al. “Longitudinal MRI-Based Deep Learning Model for Predicting Pathological Complete Response in Breast Cancer: A Multicenter, Retrospective Cohort Study.” Npj Precision Oncology, 2026.Placido, Davide, Bo Yuan, Jessica X. Hjaltelin, et al. “A Deep Learning Algorithm to Predict Risk of Pancreatic Cancer from Disease Trajectories.” Nature Medicine 29, no. 5 (2023): 1113–22.
Li, Thomas Z., John M. Still, Kaiwen Xu, et al. “Longitudinal Multimodal Transformer Integrating Imaging and Latent Clinical Signatures from Routine EHRs for Pulmonary Nodule Classification.” In Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention – MICCAI 2023, edited by Hayit Greenspan, Anant Madabhushi, Parvin Mousavi, et al. Springer Nature Switzerland, 2023. https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-43895-0_61.At instant t, predict delta until next eventPredict time-to-eventReceives randomly permuted sequence, predicts original orderingPredict ordering
